description: Provides comprehensive real estate data services including property profiles, detailed building characteristics, automated valuation models (AVM), tax assessments, and nearby school information through the ATTOM data API.

tools.name: get_property_profile
tools.description: Retrieves basic identifying information for a property including its unique identifiers, standardized address components, and geographic coding.

address.description: The complete street address of the target property, including city, state, and ZIP code.

property_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the property by the ATTOM data system.

fips.description: The Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) county code for the property's location.

apn.description: The Assessor's Parcel Number, a unique identifier assigned by the local tax assessor's office.

address.description: The standardized full street address of the property.

city.description: The city name where the property is located.

state.description: The two-letter state abbreviation where the property is located.

zip.description: The postal ZIP code for the property's address.

tools.name: get_property_details
tools.description: Retrieves detailed physical characteristics and building specifications for a property including square footage, room counts, construction year, and structural features.

address.description: The complete street address of the target property, including city, state, and ZIP code.

property_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the property by the ATTOM data system.

address.description: The standardized full street address of the property.

sqft.description: The total finished living area of the property in square feet.

lot_size.description: The total land area of the property lot in square feet.

bedrooms.description: The total number of bedrooms in the property.

bathrooms.description: The total number of bathrooms in the property, including partial baths as decimal values.

year_built.description: The calendar year when the property was originally constructed.

property_type.description: The classification of the property structure (e.g., Single Family Residence, Condominium, Townhouse).

stories.description: The number of above-ground levels or floors in the property structure.

garage_type.description: The classification of garage facilities attached to the property (e.g., Attached, Detached, None).

tools.name: get_property_valuation
tools.description: Retrieves an Automated Valuation Model (AVM) estimate for a property including the estimated market value, confidence range, and valuation metadata.

address.description: The complete street address of the target property, including city, state, and ZIP code.

estimated_value.description: The calculated Automated Valuation Model estimate of the property's current market value in USD.

value_range_low.description: The lower bound of the estimated value range representing the conservative market value estimate.

value_range_high.description: The upper bound of the estimated value range representing the optimistic market value estimate.

confidence_score.description: The rating indicating the reliability of the AVM estimate based on available data quality and comparables (e.g., High, Medium, Low).

valuation_date.description: The date when the valuation estimate was calculated, typically in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: get_tax_assessment
tools.description: Retrieves official tax assessment records for a property including assessed values, land/improvement breakdowns, and annual tax obligations.

address.description: The complete street address of the target property, including city, state, and ZIP code.

assessed_value.description: The total assessed value of the property as determined by the local tax assessor for taxation purposes.

assessed_land_value.description: The portion of the total assessed value attributed to the land itself, excluding improvements.

assessed_improvement_value.description: The portion of the total assessed value attributed to structures and improvements on the land.

tax_amount.description: The total annual property tax amount due based on the assessed value and local millage rates.

tax_year.description: The fiscal year for which the property taxes are assessed and collected.

assessment_year.description: The year in which the property valuation was assessed by the local tax authority.

tools.name: get_nearby_schools
tools.description: Retrieves a list of educational institutions located within a specified radius of the target property, including distance, type, and quality metrics.

address.description: The complete street address of the target property, including city, state, and ZIP code.

radius.description: The search radius in miles from the property location to find nearby schools. Defaults to 5 miles if not specified.

schools.description: A collection of educational institutions found within the specified search radius.

school_name.description: The official name of the educational institution.

distance.description: The linear distance from the property to the school in miles.

school_type.description: The classification of the school (e.g., Public, Private, Charter).

grade_level.description: The range of grade levels served by the school (e.g., Elementary, Middle, High, K-12).

rating.description: The numerical quality or performance rating assigned to the school by relevant educational authorities.
